name: Boot-Up Order - Gear Force
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>指</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>令</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ギア・フォース
desc: When either player's monster declares an attack and all monsters you control are face-up Machine monsters (min. 1): Destroy Attack Position monsters your opponent controls, up to the number of Machine monsters you control.
eff: When either player's monster declares an attack and all monsters you control are face-up Machine monsters (min. 1): Destroy Attack Position monsters your opponent controls, up to the number of Machine monsters you control.

mst: Destroys your opponent's Attack Position Monster Cards
